topic: Design of review mode for sk-deep-research

focus: Q2: Convergence algorithm adaptation for review mode (Shard 2)

noveltyJustification: First analysis of all 15 infrastructure components — 2 REUSE-AS-IS, 12 ADAPT, 1 REPLACE. Recommends parallel YAML workflows.

focus: Q3: Review scope decomposition and cross-reference protocol (Shard 3)
noveltyJustification: Defined 5 target types, 7 review dimensions, 6 cross-reference verification protocols with severity classification.

focus: Q4: LEAF agent design and dispatch protocol (Shard 4)
noveltyJustification: Evaluated 3 agent options — recommends new @deep-review agent (Option B). Designed dispatch template, 9-12 tool budget, tiered adversarial self-check.

focus: Q5: Output format, synthesis, and integration design (Shard 5)
noveltyJustification: Designed 11-section review-report.md, recommends /spec_kit:deep-review command (Option B), 7-point progressive synthesis protocol, 4-verdict post-review workflow.

detail: All 5 questions answered in single wave. research/research.md compiled with 10 sections. 2 minor cross-agent contradictions resolved. Ready for /spec_kit:plan.
